google_news_queries.label: DEI backlash
google_news_queries.query: "DEI" OR diversity OR equity OR inclusion conservative backlash

google_news_queries.label: Anti-trans panic
google_news_queries.query: transgender OR "gender ideology" OR pronoun conservative backlash schools

google_news_queries.query: "Muslim school" OR "Islamic school" OR "religious liberty" conservative school backlash

google_news_queries.query: "book ban" OR curriculum OR "school board" conservative outrage

google_news_queries.query: immigration conservative outrage identity schools community values

google_news_queries.query: site:reuters.com/world/us/ OR site:reuters.com/world/us/politics/ U.S. politics OR Trump OR Republicans OR Congress OR immigration OR transgender OR DEI OR religious liberty
